Zapier: Automate AI Workflows, Agents, and Apps AI automation, governed Your tools. Your rules. Any AI. Zapier gives teams one place to set guardrails, manage model access, and see everything — so everyone can build with AI confidently, on any model, without waiting for permission. Start free with email Start free with Google 450K+ Agents built 9,000+ App integrations with governed access 3.39M+ MCP tool calls completed SOC 2 (Type II) GDPR + CCPA compliant Live event The AI playbooks Netflix, Airbnb, Rippling & Indeed don't usually share Normally closed-door conversations, now opened to anyone. Get unfiltered lessons on scaling AI—plus live Q&A and a preview of new Zapier features. Grab your seat Trusted by the world’s best companies Every team has AI. Now they need a system. Your teams are connecting AI tools to your business systems. Each one works great alone. The question is whether they work together — safely, visibly, without collisions. Any AI, connected Use MCP for assistants like Claude and ChatGPT. Use Zapier SDK for custom AI apps. One governed connection to 9,000+ apps. Agents that take action AI that scores leads, processes documents, routes tickets, and handles requests — autonomously, 24/7, across your business tools. Every team under one roof Each team gets the right tools, right models, and right guardrails. IT sets boundaries, not bottlenecks. Complete visibility, built in Every AI action logged. Every model call is tracked. Your CISO asks what's running — you answer in under a minute. Learn more about governance Explore Zapier for Enterprise Every AI surface. Every developer tool. One secure connection. AI assistants plug in through MCP. Developers and coding agents plug in through the SDK. Different doors, same building — IT sees everything, auth is handled, and Zapier’s runtime does the heavy lifting. MCP • AI agents Claude ChatGPT Any MCP client SDK • Devs and AI agents Your agent Claude Code Cursor TypeScript App ░░░░░░░░░░░░░░ Salesforce Slack HubSpot Snowflake Microsoft Teams Jira Gmail ServiceNow +9,000 more apps One auth layer No hardcoded API keys. No broken OAuth flows. Whether it’s Claude making the call or a workflow, every credential is managed the same way. One audit trail Every action from any AI assistant or developer tool lands in a single admin log. Shadow IT becomes visible IT. One policy set IT decides which apps and actions are available. Those rules apply across MCP clients and SDK callers equally. One configuration, no exceptions. One runtime Retries, error recovery, reliability. All backed by Zapier’s 13-year-old production infrastructure. Not by whatever the LLM decided to write last Tuesday. 66,000+ Triggers and actions 9,000+ App integrations 1 Audit trail for everything Learn more about MCP Get started with Zapier SDK Webinar What leaders from Netflix, Airbnb, Rippling, and Indeed wish they'd known before scaling AI Real IT and Admin leaders sharing what's working — and what isn't — as they govern AI across every department. Candid conversation, live demos, and practical playbooks for the space between locking everything down and letting it all run unsupervised. April 23 · Virtual Free, with open AMA Featuring leaders from Register now Meet your complete AI toolkit Everything you need to build, automate, and scale with AI — no code required. AI Workflows AI Agents AI Chatbots Tables Forms Canvas Enterprise Functions 9,000 apps+ AI Workflows Automate advanced workflows with the full building power of Zapier. Connect AI directly to your workflows, build your own agents, and actually deliver on your AI strategy. Connect 400+ AI tools to 9,000+ everyday apps Build AI agents that work while you sleep Deploy chatbots that solve customer problems automatically Use built-in AI assistance to create workflows in minutes Onboard employees Resolve IT tickets Qualify leads Support sales reps Answer FAQs Assist customers Repurpose content Onboard employees Resolve IT tickets Qualify leads Support sales reps Answer FAQs Assist customers Repurpose content Simplify concepts Generate posts Assist shoppers Uncover sales leads Centralize leads Research leads Coach sales calls Create images Simplify concepts Generate posts Assist shoppers Uncover sales leads Centralize leads Research leads Coach sales calls Create images Summarize emails Get AI voice summaries Prepare for calls Implement IT support Help customers Implement IT support Reply to emails Summarize emails Get AI voice summaries Prepare for calls Implement IT support Help customers Implement IT support Reply to emails Explore Zapier AI AI that drives real outcomes See what's possible when your AI is connected and governed. AI Marketing Tracker Track campaigns and generate cross-channel AI reports. Try now Renewal Risk Alerts Detect at-risk renewals early and alert teams. Try now Deal Desk Approvals Route HubSpot deal approvals into Slack for faster decisions. Try now AI FAQ Assistant Answer questions and triage requests in Slack with AI. Try now Inbound Message Routing Classify and route inbound messages across channels automatically. Try now IT Help Desk Automation Automate IT requests with AI chatbots. Try now See more templates Governance that scales with you Control what runs, empower teams to build, and stay on top of everything in real-time. Control Define exactly what runs Most platforms give you a binary choice: allow an app or block it. Zapier goes deeper — endpoint-level restrictions, corporate-only authentication, and the option to route AI through your own infrastructure. The more precisely you control, the more confidently you can say "yes" to builders. Features Action Restrictions Define exactly which actions are allowed in each app so teams can move fast without compromising sensitive systems. BYOM (Bring Your Own Model) Run AI through your own infrastructure, including Amazon Bedrock, so you can adopt AI automation while keeping your existing security, compliance, and access controls in place. Managed Connections Use company-owned app connections managed by IT to ensure consistent access and keep automations running as teams change. Domain Restrictions Block personal accounts from connecting to business systems to prevent data from leaving your environment. App Access Controls Allow or block apps across your workspace so teams only use tools that meet your security standards. Delegation Give teams their own space Workspaces let you delegate authority without losing oversight. Each team gets their own environment with inherited guardrails. They build freely and you see everything. No more choosing between access and accountability. Features Workspaces Create dedicated environments for each team with the right apps, connections, and controls, so they can build independently while staying within IT-defined guardrails and security standards. Guided Templates Start from approved templates, so every build begins with the right structure, tools, and safeguards. Role-Based Access Control who can view, build, or manage workflows by assigning role-based permissions. SCIM Provisioning Automate user provisioning through your identity provider so access stays current as teams change. Visibility Gain full insight into every workflow Every AI action is logged, every workflow is documented, and every output is checked, so you always know what's happening. Features Asset History Access audit data programmatically through an API so you can query, analyze, and report on automation activity at scale. AI Guardrails Add built-in safety checks that block sensitive data and detect risky inputs before AI outputs reach your systems. Log Streaming Send real-time workflow data to tools like Datadog or Splunk for centralized monitoring. Canvas Documentation Automatically generate documentation for every workflow, so teams can easily understand and audit processes. Security at scale Security built into every workflow SOC 2 (Type II) & SOC 3 Enterprise-grade compliance GDPR & CCPA Data privacy compliance 99.9% uptime Enterprise SLA SSO + user provisioning SAML-based SSO and SCIM AI model opt-out Automatic on Enterprise plan Observability End-to-end logs and analytics Platform controls Action Restrictions Managed Connections AI Guardrails Asset History Bring Your Own Model Log Streaming Explore Zapier Security Go from AI experiments to real results Connect any AI. Govern every team. See everything. Minutes to configure, not months to negotiate. Start free Talk to sales

About Zapier We're humans who think computers should do more work Over 2 million businesses automate with Zapier Zapier at a glance We’re on a mission to make automation work for everyone. As the leader in easy automation, Zapier empowers businesses to automate workflows and move data across 7,000+ apps . We work with what you work with, across your apps and tech stack, so you can make magic happen. 81 billion tasks automated on Zapier 25 million Zaps created 69% of the Fortune 1000 use Zapier We’ve been working remotely since day one We’re 800+ people across 38 countries, committed to helping you streamline your most important work. Come join us. Browse job openings → Our Zapier values → Default to action We believe in progress over perfection—delivering and learning from our projects sooner rather than later. Default to transparency We do our best work when we make projects, processes, and systems available to everyone who needs them. Grow through feedback Good feedback enables growth. It isn’t always easy, but we make a point to be good at it with peers and leaders. Empathy over ego Empathy promotes understanding, curiosity, and humility—qualities that help us connect with and serve our customers. Build the robot We’re all about finding ways to work better. We optimize for efficiency through tools, processes, and code. Zapier is the leader in easy automation #13 on Forbes Cloud 100 #8 on Y Combinator’s Top Companies The Enterprise Tech 30 Technology of the Year 2021 Businesses of all sizes put automation into action 0 Explore more at Zapier Join us at Zapier We’re on a mission to make automation work for everyone. And we’re hiring! Browse our job openings Meet our customers Discover how businesses use Zapier as the backbone of their work. See our customer stories Become a partner Join 7,000+ businesses to empower your users with automation. Explore our Partner Program

Plans & Pricing | Zapier ⚡️ Better together: Explore Zaps, Tables, Forms, and Zapier MCP in one package. Pricing AI orchestration plans Unlock the power of AI orchestration across your organization. Zaps, Tables, Forms, and Zapier MCP bring together automated workflows, structured data, custom forms, and an AI action layer in one platform. AI orchestration Platform Add-ons Agents Chatbots New: Zaps, Tables, Forms, and Zapier MCP are now all available in one unified plan. AI needs infrastructure to run your business. That’s why Zapier now includes Tables and Forms on Free, Pro, and Team plans, at no additional cost, along with Zapier MCP. With data, custom forms, workflows, and AI actions in one package, Zapier is your platform to orchestrate AI. Learn more about why we made this change 100 2K 10K 100K 1M 2M Select a task tier Select an item 100 tasks /mo 750 tasks /mo 1.5K tasks /mo 2K tasks /mo 5K tasks /mo 10K tasks /mo 20K tasks /mo 50K tasks /mo 100K tasks /mo 200K tasks /mo 300K tasks /mo 400K tasks /mo 500K tasks /mo 750K tasks /mo 1M tasks /mo 1.5M tasks /mo 1.75M tasks /mo 2M tasks /mo Custom task limit Learn about tasks Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a payment interval Pay yearly (Save 33%) Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a currency USD ($) USD ($) Free Start automating with AI. Connect user interfaces, data tables, and Zaps with logic to automate custom workflows—all on Zapier. Unlimited Zaps, Tables and Forms No matter what plan you choose, you can create as many Zaps as your task limit allows. Two-step Zaps Two-step Zaps have one trigger (e.g., a new email lead) and one action (e.g., add the lead to my CRM) so you can connect two apps and automatically move data from one to the other. Zapier Copilot* Build with an AI assistant. Use Copilot to create Zaps, generate code steps, map fields, and troubleshoot errors. *Free plans have daily message limits; paid plans include unlimited messages Professional Unlock the full power of the Zapier platform with unlimited access to Zaps, Tables, and Forms. Starting from $ 19 . 99 /mo Billed annually Try it free Professional plan features: Multi-step Zaps Create Zaps that perform as many actions as you want from a single trigger. Add powerful workflow features to your Zaps like conditional paths, data formatting, trigger scheduling, and more. Unlimited Premium apps Premium apps are select apps exclusively available to users on paid plans. Webhooks Build powerful, custom integrations that connect any app with Webhooks by Zapier. Email and live chat** support Connect with our technical support team through email or real-time, live chat** (**live chat is available for Professional plan users on a 2,000+ task tier) AI fields Connect your OpenAI account and easily enrich Table records with the power of AI. Conditional form logic Determine which questions are displayed on your Interfaces based on previous responses. Team Collaborate with your team to build and manage complete AI-powered systems. Starting from $ 69 /mo Billed annually Try it free Contact Sales Team plan features: 25 users Team members who can create and manage automations. SAML SSO Ensure secure access for your team using SAML 2.0 identity and access management (IAM) providers. Premier Support Get faster, prioritized responses from our dedicated Premier Support team. Enterprise Scale AI-powered systems across your entire organization Contact for pricing Contact Sales More about Enterprise Enterprise plan features: Unlimited users Team members who can create and manage automations. Advanced admin permissions and app controls Ensure that only the right people have access to sensitive apps, Zaps and more. Get as granular as which actions can be used for what apps. Advanced deployment options Connect securely to internal data sources with VPC Peering Annual task limits Instead of tasks expiring monthly, they’ll expire annually, so you don’t need to worry about budgeting tasks. Observability Monitor and optimize your entire automation ecosystem. Track what's working, spot bottlenecks, and ensure compliance. Technical Account Manager*** Get a Technical Account Manager who’s intimately familiar with your account to help field questions from your team and make strategy recommendations. ***Technical Account Managers are included at a set threshold or as an optional add-on. See all features All paid plans include The full building power of Zapier Visual no-code editor Tables for data storage and Forms for custom forms and tools Unlimited app integrations All built-in data and AI workflow tools Advanced Zap management capabilities Zap version control Custom error notifications Advanced Zap settings Access to the full Zapier toolkit Forms Tables Zaps Canvas MCP How it works together With your Zapier plan, you can leverage the power of our platform to build complete automation systems. Each tool in our platform enhances the others to create powerful end-to-end solutions. Infinite possibilities Onboard employees Resolve IT tickets Qualify leads Support sales reps Answer FAQs Assist customers Repurpose content Onboard employees Resolve IT tickets Qualify leads Support sales reps Answer FAQs Assist customers Repurpose content Simplify concepts Generate posts Assist shoppers Uncover sales leads Centralize leads Research leads Coach sales calls Create images Simplify concepts Generate posts Assist shoppers Uncover sales leads Centralize leads Research leads Coach sales calls Create images Summarize emails Get AI voice summaries Prepare for calls Implement IT support Help customers Implement IT support Reply to emails Summarize emails Get AI voice summaries Prepare for calls Implement IT support Help customers Implement IT support Reply to emails Explore templates Our commitment to flexible, risk-free pricing Your plan, your way Pick any task tier, and if you reach your limit, you can switch to pay-as-you-go until you’re ready for a higher tier. More valuable as you grow The higher the task tier, the lower the cost per task. No matter which plan you choose, you'll get more value the more you use Zapier. Commit and save Commit to annual payments for a lower monthly fee. Or talk with our Sales team for access to deeper discounts on our Enterprise plan. Frequently asked questions Zapier overview Do I need to know how to code? Nope! Zapier makes it easy for you to move data between your apps without being a developer. We may need you to locate information for certain accounts, but we'll guide you through any additional steps. Our Support champions are also here to help you via email should you need assistance. What are apps? An app is a web service or application, such as Google Docs , Slack , or Salesforce . Zapier offers integrations for more than 8,000 apps and helps you easily move data between them to automate repetitive tasks. Premium apps are select apps exclusively available to users on paid Zapier plans. What is a Zap? A Zap is an automated workflow that connects your apps and services together. Each Zap consists of a trigger and one or more actions. When you turn your Zap on, it will run the action steps every time the trigger event occurs. What are tasks? A task is counted every time a Zap successfully moves data or completes an action for you automatically. For example, if your Zap has an action to create new Google Contacts, each contact created will use one task. If the action isn't successfully completed, it doesn't count against your task limit. What is a trigger? A trigger is an event that starts a Zap. Once you turn on a Zap, Zapier will monitor for that trigger event. For example, if you create a Zap that sends a message to a rep each time you get a new lead, the trigger is a new lead entering your lead management app. Triggers don't count toward your task limit. What's the difference between Zaps, triggers, actions, and tasks? Zap is our term for the automated workflows you set up to connect your apps. A trigger is the event that starts your Zap. Actions are events that happen automatically after your Zap is triggered. For example, in a Zap that sends a message to a Sales rep each time you get a new lead, the trigger is the new lead entering your lead management app, and the action is the Slack notification sent with the new lead's info. When Zapier performs an action successfully, it counts as a task. Each successful action in a Zap counts as a separate task. Does checking (or polling) for new data use tasks? Zapier never charges you a task to check for new data—only when a Zap successfully completes an action for you. For instance, say you want an automated workflow to check—or poll—your Dropbox account every five minutes for new files. Then, if a new file appears, the workflow will send you a Slack message. In this case, sending the Slack message about the new Dropbox file counts as a task. How many tasks do I need? The number of tasks you need depends on the number of active Zaps you have and how frequently those Zaps run to automate your work. The more actions your Zaps complete, the more tasks you'll need. But don't worry! When you reach your plan’s task limit, we'll notify you via email. When you reach your plan’s task limit, we'll also switch you to pay-per-task billing . What happens if I hit my task limit? We'll email you when you reach your plan's task limit. Once you've reached that limit, we'll switch you to pay-per-task billing at a rate of 1.25x the cost of a base task on your subscription so your Zaps continue running. When you're on pay-per-task billing, we’ll email you if you’re close to your plan’s maximum task limit (3x your task subscription) and then again when you reach it. Once you’ve reached your maximum task limit, your Zaps will pause until the start of your next pay period. You can learn more about task overages here . Our Sales team is also available to help you choose the right plan for your business. Will I be charged a task for any of Zapier’s built-in data tools? Zapier offers a variety of built-in data tools in the App Directory that help you add conditional filter and path logic, and format data. The following steps don't count as a task: Zapier Tables Zapier Forms Filter by Zapier Formatter by Zapier Path by Zapier Delay, Looping, Sub-Zap, Digest, Zapier Manager, Storage How many connections does Zapier support? Zapier connects to 7,000+ apps, more than any other automation tool. If you want to connect your internal tools, you can build your own private integration with our easy-to-use developer platform . Tables How do we get started with Tables? You can begin by creating a table, importing a dataset used across teams or workflows, and connecting it to Zaps or AI Agents. Because Tables supports unlimited tables on every plan, teams can onboard gradually—centralizing datasets as their automation needs expand. Check out our help docs, blog guide, or a walkthrough video from our team. Help Center Blog guide Do Tables actions count toward my Zapier task usage? No. When using Tables in your Zaps, both triggers and actions do not count toward your task usage. This allows organizations to run high-volume data workflows and support AI Agents without driving up task consumption—ideal for enterprise-wide automation. Learn more. Forms How can I try Forms? Forms is now included as part of your Zapier plan. You can create an unlimited number of Forms. The number of pages you can have across these Forms will vary depending on which plan tier you are on. How is Forms different from other options out there? Zapier Forms is the only product on the market that connects your form, web page, or app with more than 8,000 integrations—without any coding required. When you combine Forms with Zapier’s powerful automation tools, you can build flexible, tailored solutions in minutes. MCP What is Zapier MCP? Zapier Model Context Protocol allows your AI apps to securely interact with tools. Zapier MCP connects you to Zapier's vast ecosystem of 8,000 integrations. How much does Zapier MCP cost? Zapier MCP is available to all accounts. One MCP tool call uses two tasks from your Zapier plan’s quota. Is Zapier MCP secure? Yes, MCP endpoints include built-in authentication for secure, reliable connections. Learn more Plans and payments Should I use the Team or Enterprise plan? The Team plan provides features that facilitate collaboration on automation across several groups or teams. These features include shared app connections and a shared workspace. The Enterprise plan enables your entire team to use Zapier, with advanced security features, governance, and monitoring features such as advanced admin permissions and custom data retention. Enterprise allows you to empower all of your employees while providing safeguards you need to protect sensitive data and critical workflows. Which plans allow for unlimited users? Unlimited users are available only on the Enterprise plan. Do you have a free trial of your premium features? Yes! When you create a new Zapier account, you're instantly enrolled in a free 14-day trial of the Zapier Professional plan. No credit card required. Please contact our Sales team if you want to enroll in a free trial of the Zapier Team and Enterprise plans to experience our most advanced collaboration features and admin controls. Can I change my plan later? Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade at any time. If you upgrade, the change happens immediately, and you'll only pay a prorated amount for the rest of the billing cycle. If you choose to downgrade, it'll take effect at the end of that billing cycle. What if I decide to cancel? If you no longer wish to use Zapier, you may cancel at any time. You'll still have access to your paid plan for the remainder of your billing cycle. See also our refund policy here. Do you offer any discounts? Yes! When you choose to pre-pay for a year of service, you'll receive a discount compared to monthly payments. Please see the pricing details above. We also offer an additional 15% discount for non-profits. Learn more here . Can you charge me in my local currency? Yes, we currently accept payment in multiple currencies with more currencies being added soon. You can see a list all of our accepted payment methods and currencies here . Can I pay via invoice or wire transfer? You can pay via invoice or wire transfer if you are on an Enterprise plan. To learn more, visit Zapier for Enterprise . Sales and support Do you have a Sales team? Yes, you can contact our Sales team to book a demo for our Professional, Team, and Enterprise plans. What level of support do Team and Enterprise plans get? Team and Enterprise plans get Premier Support, which provides faster, prioritized responses from our dedicated Premier Support team. On top of Premier Support, the Enterprise plan gives you a customized onboarding program, a Technical Account Manager, and a Customer Success Manager to help answer questions and work with your team in building advanced workflows. What if I have more questions? Try searching for what you need in our Help and Support site. If you don't find what you're looking for, you can get help here. Agents plans Learn more about Agents Create your own AI-powered teammates in minutes. Try it free, and scale as needed. Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a payment interval Pay yearly (Save 33%) Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a currency USD ($) USD ($) Free Experiment with AI agents. $ 0 /mo Free forever Try it free Free plan features: 400 activities per month Live data sources Web browsing Interact with your agents in the Chrome Extension Pro Build agentic teammates to handle daily work. $ 33 . 33 /mo Billed annually Try it free Pro plan features: 1,500 activities per month Live data sources Web browsing Interact with your agents in the Chrome extension Need more activities? Contact us Enterprise (Coming Soon) Orchestrate agents across your organization. Contact for pricing Contact Sales Enterprise (Coming Soon) plan features: Custom number of activities per month Agent sharing across your organization Enterprise-grade audit logs Restricted apps support Plus the features from Pro Frequently asked questions What is an activity? Activities include actions your agent takes in behaviors or in chat, browsing the web, or looking up information from attached knowledge. For a complete description, see this article . You can run up to 400 activities per month on a Free plan, or up to 1,500 on a Pro plan. If you need more activities, let's talk . How are activities counted for Zapier Team accounts? If you have a Team account on Zapier, your team shares a pool of Agents activities. For example, if you upgrade to a Pro plan for Agents, you can run up to 1,500 activities across all the agents your team creates. Can I use Agents with my Zapier Enterprise account? Not out of the box. Zapier Agents doesn't currently support app and action restrictions that may be in place on an Enterprise account. If you’re on an Enterprise plan and would like to use Agents, please reach out to us . How do I improve the reliability of agents? You can improve your agent's reliability by following a few of our tips for writing an effective AI prompt: Include helpful info up front Provide examples Define the expected format and length of your response Give bots a role Browse our prompt tips. Why don’t I get the same outcome from AI every time? That’s because of non-determinism. That’s the fancy term describing why AI agents will reply with different, but likely similar, answers to the same question. It’s a feature that’s core to Large Language Models (LLMs), and what makes LLMs different from computers, which will do the same thing every single time. It’s not a bug, it’s a feature! What app actions can agents perform on my behalf? Zapier Agents can only take actions in the apps you’ve connected and use the triggers and actions you’ve set up. When configuring a behavior trigger or action field for an agent, you can have it always use the same value, pick from a specific set of values, have it guess the value, or not set any value. To provide additional control, you can add more details to your behavior instructions. For example, if you want your agent to always send a direct message to you in Slack, select yourself in the "To username" field but leave the "Message" field "Let your agent generate a value for this field" so your agent can send a custom message every time. How can I get access to Agents? Anyone can try Zapier Agents for free today by going to agents.zapier.com and logging in with your Zapier account. You can also sign up for a free Zapier account if you don’t already have one. Sign up now How can I provide feedback or report bugs? Thank you for helping us improve Agents! Use our contact form to provide feedback, report bugs, or submit support requests. You can also join Zapier’s Early Access Program to get access to a Slack workspace to share feedback and discuss Agents with Zapier staff and other early adopters. Chatbots plans Learn more about Chatbots Build custom, AI-powered chatbots with the power of Zapier automation to scale your business. Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a payment interval Pay yearly (Save 33%) Pay monthly Pay yearly (Save 33%) Select a currency USD ($) USD ($) Free For individuals who are trying out AI chatbots. $ 0 /mo Free forever Try it free Free plan features: 2 Chatbots total GPT-4o mini & GPT-4.1 mini Conversation history Suggestions Pro For individuals who want to build AI chatbots trained on their data $ 13 . 33 /mo Billed annually Try it free Pro plan features: 5 Chatbots total Embed 10 sources of knowledge per Chatbot 100K Table records Collect leads Advanced For individuals who want to further customize their chatbots $ 66 . 67 /mo Billed annually Try it free Advanced plan features: 20 Chatbots total Remove Zapier logo 20 sources of knowledge per Chatbot Custom Contact us for a custom plan with more than 20 chatbots Contact for pricing Contact Sales Custom plan features: 20 Chatbots total See all features Frequently asked questions How can I try Chatbots? If you have a Zapier account, simply log into your account to get started with Chatbots for free. Don't have a Zapier account yet? Sign up for free . How is Chatbots different from other options out there? Zapier Chatbots are powered by automation, so you can create custom AI chatbots with your own prompts and connect them to your Zaps—no code needed. Is Chatbots included for free in my paid Zapier plan? Yes you can try Chatbots for free! Chatbots advanced customization and configuration options are available for purchase on any Zapier plan. Are you adding new functionality? Yes! We are heavily investing in Chatbots and we’re excited to build new functionality to support your needs. If you have feedback on what features are critical for you please share that feedback here .
